rows.intent: Fail-closed boundary collapse: admit IFF verdict == ALLOW (+1); INDETERMINATE (0) and DENY (-1) both reject.

rows.name: vAnd
rows.signature: pure flow vAnd(a: Int, b: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: Kleene-K3 conjunction: the minimum of two trits (-1 DENY < 0 INDETERMINATE < +1 ALLOW).

rows.name: chainValidVerdict

rows.name: notExpiredVerdict

rows.intent: Fail-closed expiry gate: inside the validity window +1; outside -1; no window/clock 0.

rows.intent: Fail-closed revocation gate: revoked -1; good AND fresh +1; unknown/stale/unprovable 0 — unknown collapses the channel to DENY through the fold.

rows.name: certVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow certVerdict(pinMatch: Int, chainValid: Int, notExpired: Int, revocationFresh: Int) -> Int

rows.name: epochAdoptVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow epochAdoptVerdict(epochStrictlyGreater: Bool, keyReal: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Forward-only epoch adoption: a strictly-greater epoch AND a real non-zero key, else refuse.

rows.name: configVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow configVerdict(batchSizePositive: Bool, strictKeyOk: Bool, epochIdOk: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Fail-closed audit-egress config: a positive batchSize, a real key under strictKey, and a positive epochId.

rows.name: integrityVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed integrity gate: a block whose recomputed digest does not match the manifest's expected hex is refused (LSIO-INTEGRITY-001); a match -> 'ok'.

rows.name: mapGuardVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow mapGuardVerdict(sourceLen: Int, totalBytes: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed staging guard: a source shorter than manifest.totalBytes (or a corrupt negative totalBytes) is refused (LSIO-MAP-001); sufficient length -> 'ok'.

rows.name: blockBoundsVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow blockBoundsVerdict(offset: Int, end: Int, totalBytes: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed block-bounds gate: a block whose [offset,end) is negative-start, past totalBytes, or end<offset is a malformed manifest and is refused (LSIO-MAP-001); a well-formed range -> 'ok'.

rows.name: releaseVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow releaseVerdict(boundsResult: String, integrityResult: String) -> String
rows.intent: Compose the hardened-border gates: a block is released only if bounds AND integrity pass; the first failing verdict denies (returns its code), else 'release'.

rows.name: headerVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow headerVerdict(versionNonEmpty: Bool, sourceNonEmpty: Bool, totalBytesNonNegInt: Bool, blocksIsArray: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed manifest-header gate: a missing/empty version or source, a non-integer/negative totalBytes, or a non-array blocks field is a malformed manifest (LSIO-MANIFEST-001); all well-formed -> 'ok'.

rows.name: blockShapeVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow blockShapeVerdict(idNonEmpty: Bool, offsetNonNegInt: Bool, lengthNonNegInt: Bool, sha256NonEmptyHex: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed per-block shape gate: a malformed id / offset / length / sha256 is LSIO-MANIFEST-001; a well-formed block -> 'ok'.

rows.name: blockLayoutVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow blockLayoutVerdict(offset: Int, end: Int, totalBytes: Int, prevEnd: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed block-layout gate: a block past totalBytes, overlapping the previous block, or with end<offset is LSIO-MANIFEST-001; a contiguous in-range block -> 'ok'.

rows.name: blockVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow blockVerdict(shape: String, layout: String) -> String
rows.intent: Compose a block's gates: the first failing verdict wins; both pass -> 'ok'.

rows.name: manifestVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow manifestVerdict(header: String, allBlocksOk: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Compose the manifest gate: a bad header or any bad block denies (LSIO-MANIFEST-001); a well-formed manifest -> 'valid'.

rows.name: isAligned
rows.signature: pure flow isAligned(ptr: Int, align: Int) -> Bool
rows.intent: 128-bit alignment predicate: ptr >= 0 AND ptr is a whole multiple of align.

rows.name: checkAligned
rows.signature: pure flow checkAligned(ptr: Int, align: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed alignment check: 'ok' iff ptr is a non-negative multiple of align, else 'LSM-ALIGN-001'.

rows.name: checkInBounds
rows.signature: pure flow checkInBounds(ptr: Int, len: Int, capacity: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed bounds check: 'ok' iff [ptr, ptr+len) lies fully inside [0, capacity), else 'LSM-BOUNDS-001'.

rows.name: alignUp
rows.signature: pure flow alignUp(n: Int, align: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: Round n up to the next multiple of align using integer arithmetic (no floats).

rows.name: allocateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow allocateVerdict(flightLocked: Bool, bytesNegative: Bool, runAvailable: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed allocate gate: LSM-FLIGHT-LOCKED during a locked flight; LSM-BOUNDS-001 for a negative request; LSM-POOL-EXHAUSTED when no contiguous run is free; else 'ok'.

rows.name: freeVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed free gate: a pointer with no live allocation is unknown (LSM-FREE-001); a live pointer -> 'ok'.

rows.name: useAfterFreeVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow useAfterFreeVerdict(ptrIsLive: Bool, generationMatches: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed use-after-free guard: a freed ptr or a generation mismatch (freed+reused slot, the ABA case) is a stale handle (LSM-UAF-001); a live, generation-matched handle -> 'ok'.

rows.name: scrubFillByte
rows.intent: Segment-correct REJECT-fill byte: compute memory scrubs with 0xFF (255); governance (and any non-compute segment, fail-safe) scrubs with 0x00 so freed trit memory decodes to REJECT, never ILLEGAL.

rows.name: checkPoolConfig
rows.signature: pure flow checkPoolConfig(blockBytes: Int, totalBytes: Int, align: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed pool config check: 'ok' iff blockBytes is a positive multiple of align AND totalBytes is a positive multiple of blockBytes; else the LSM-CFG-00x trap code.

rows.name: segmentOfPtr
rows.signature: pure flow segmentOfPtr(ptr: Int, capacityBytes: Int, governanceBase: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Resolve which pool segment a ptr belongs to: 'compute' below governanceBase, 'governance' at/above it; 'LSM-BOUNDS-001' if the ptr is outside [0, capacityBytes).

rows.name: checkSegmentAccess
rows.signature: pure flow checkSegmentAccess(actual: String, intended: String) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed Compute/Governance isolation verdict: 'ok' iff `actual` equals `intended` and both are recognized segments ('compute' or 'governance'); else 'LSM-SEGV-001'.

rows.name: checkTritCount
rows.intent: Fail-closed buffer-size check: 'ok' iff tritCount is non-negative; else 'LSM-TRIT-INDEX'.

rows.name: checkTritValue
rows.intent: Fail-closed trit-domain check: 'ok' iff value is in {-1, 0, +1}; else 'LSM-TRIT-RANGE'.

rows.name: checkTritIndex
rows.signature: pure flow checkTritIndex(i: Int, tritCount: Int) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed trit-index check: 'ok' iff 0 <= i < tritCount; else 'LSM-TRIT-INDEX'.

rows.name: checkTritEnc
rows.intent: Fail-closed tamper check on a decoded 2-bit trit code: 'ok' iff enc is in {0, 1, 2}; else 'LSM-TRIT-CORRUPT' (the sentinel 3, or any out-of-range code, is tampered memory).

rows.name: powerStateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow powerStateVerdict(atOrAboveCritical: Bool, atOrAboveSafe: Bool, atOrAboveThrottle: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Fold the thermal thresholds into a power-state, hottest band first (fail-closed toward safety).

rows.name: kernelForState
rows.intent: Map a power-state to the hottest kernel tier its band permits (native/simd/shadow).

rows.name: adjustmentVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow adjustmentVerdict(targetRank: Int, permittedRank: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: Grant a kernel request only if it is cooler-or-equal to the band ceiling; deny any up-tier.

rows.name: envelopeValid
rows.signature: pure flow envelopeValid(throttlePositive: Bool, throttleLtSafe: Bool, safeLtCritical: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Fail-closed envelope check: require 0 < throttle < safe < critical, else reject (LSP-ENV-001).

rows.name: killSwitchVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed thermal kill-switch: deny at TERMINAL (critical), else allow (LSP-CRITICAL-001).

rows.name: restoreVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow restoreVerdict(snapshotPresent: Bool, integrityOk: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Fail-closed cold-boot restore: restore only if the snapshot is present AND integrity holds (LSS-NOSNAP-001 / LSS-INTEGRITY-001).

rows.name: syncGateVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed sync precondition: the boot physical↔tick mapping must be recorded before a drift check (LST-SYNC-001).

rows.name: driftGateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow driftGateVerdict(synced: Bool, driftAbs: Int, maxDriftTicks: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: Fail-closed drift gate: deny if unsynced, or if |drift| exceeds the stability envelope; else allow.

rows.name: descriptorVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow descriptorVerdict(hasFuseBlock: Bool, nameAndShaStrings: Bool, wasmShaValidFormat: Bool, schemaRecognized: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed fuse-descriptor gate: no fuse block -> FUNGI-FUSE-NO-DESCRIPTOR; missing/mistyped name/hash or bad hash format -> FUNGI-FUSE-BAD-DESCRIPTOR; absent/unknown schemaVersion -> FUNGI-FUSE-VERSION; else 'ok'.

rows.name: hashGateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow hashGateVerdict(wasmPresent: Bool, hashMatches: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed Gate 1: a missing .wasm -> FUNGI-FUSE-NO-WASM; a sha256 that does not match the signed descriptor -> FUNGI-FUSE-HASH-MISMATCH (tamper); else 'ok'.

rows.name: sidecarVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow sidecarVerdict(sidecarPresent: Bool, sidecarAgrees: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed sidecar cross-check: a present .fuse.json whose wasmSha256 disagrees with the signed manifest -> FUNGI-FUSE-SIDECAR-DRIFT; absent or agreeing -> 'ok'.

rows.name: revocationGateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow revocationGateVerdict(keyIdAsserted: Bool, checkActive: Bool, checkThrew: Bool, revoked: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed revocation gate: a throwing check -> FUNGI-FUSE-REVOCATION-UNVERIFIABLE; a revoked keyId -> FUNGI-FUSE-KEY-REVOKED (even unverified/allowUnsigned); no asserted keyId or no injected check -> 'ok'.

rows.name: signaturePolicyVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow signaturePolicyVerdict(sigVerified: Bool, requireSignature: Bool, allowUnsigned: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed signature policy: a verified signature -> 'admit'; an unsigned manifest is 'unsigned-refused' unless allowUnsigned (and never when requireSignature) -> 'admit'.

rows.name: registryGateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow registryGateVerdict(registryActive: Bool, registryOk: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed central-registry gate: an active registry check returning non-ok -> 'registry-refused'; no check, or ok -> 'ok'.

rows.name: capabilityGrantVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed Gate 3 (per declared capability): a declared capability with no host-import factory -> FUNGI-FUSE-UNKNOWN-CAP; a known capability -> 'grant'.

rows.name: admitVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow admitVerdict(descriptorV: String, hashV: String, sidecarV: String, revocationV: String, signaturePolicyV: String, registryV: String, capabilityV: String) -> String
rows.intent: Compose the fusion gates (descriptor -> hash -> sidecar -> revocation -> signature policy -> registry -> capability): the first failing verdict denies; all pass -> 'fused'.

rows.name: authGateVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow authGateVerdict(authMode: String, hasChannelVerdict: Bool, channelVerdictAuthorized: Bool, headerPresent: Bool, allowPresenceFallback: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed kernel auth gate 6: a required-auth route admits ONLY on an authorizing channel verdict (or an explicit opt-in header-presence fallback); bare presence never authenticates.

rows.name: capabilityVerdict
rows.intent: Fail-closed capability-expansion gate: a manifest declaring capabilities absent from the lockfile is a breaking security change (FUNGI-PKG-001); zero added -> 'ok'.

rows.name: installScriptVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow installScriptVerdict(declared: Bool, isDeny: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Deny-by-default install-script gate: a declared, non-'deny' install script is refused (FUNGI-PKG-004); absent or 'deny' -> 'ok'.

rows.name: registryTrustVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow registryTrustVerdict(enforce: Bool, requireCertified: Bool, hasRegistry: Bool, registryAllowed: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed registry-trust gate: under enforcement a missing registry (certified mode) or an off-allow-list registry is untrusted (FUNGI-PKG-002); no enforcement -> 'ok'.

rows.name: hashVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow hashVerdict(hasValidHash: Bool, requireCertified: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Content-hash provenance gate: a valid sha256 hash -> 'ok'; otherwise FUNGI-PKG-003 as a blocking error under certified mode, else an advisory 'WARN:FUNGI-PKG-003'.

rows.name: signatureVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow signatureVerdict(hasSignature: Bool, requireCertified: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Signature provenance gate: a present signature -> 'ok'; otherwise FUNGI-PKG-005 as a blocking error under certified mode, else an advisory 'WARN:FUNGI-PKG-005'.

rows.name: revocationVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow revocationVerdict(hasSignerKeyId: Bool, checkAvailable: Bool, revoked: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed signer-revocation gate: a package signed by a revoked key is refused (FUNGI-PKG-006); no keyId or no injected check -> 'ok' (revocation is an injected, opt-in predicate).

rows.name: blockClass
rows.intent: Classify a per-check verdict for admission: 'ok' and 'WARN:*' -> 'pass'; any error-severity code -> 'block'.

rows.name: admitVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow admitVerdict(capV: String, installV: String, registryV: String, hashV: String, signatureV: String, revocationV: String) -> String
rows.intent: Compose the six per-package manifest gates: the first error-severity verdict denies (returns its code); if none block, the package is 'admitted' (warnings do not deny).

rows.name: riskRank
rows.intent: Rank a risk rating on the low<medium<high<critical lattice; unknown -> 99 (fail-closed).

rows.name: signatureVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow signatureVerdict(hasEd25519Sig: Bool, sigNonEmpty: Bool, canonIsJcs: Bool, verifyResult: String, schemaOk: Bool, freshEnough: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fold the central-index signature evidence fail-closed: unsigned/malformed/no-key/bad-sig/stale -> refuse, else 'verified'.

rows.name: lookupVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow lookupVerdict(nameCount: Int, versionCount: Int, hashMatches: Bool, keyIdProvided: Bool, keyIdMatches: Bool) -> String
rows.intent: Fold registry lookup evidence fail-closed: unknown/version-unknown/duplicate/hash/keyId -> refuse, else 'ok'.

rows.name: policyVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow policyVerdict(levelAllowed: Bool, gateOnRisk: Bool, riskRating: String, maxRiskRating: String) -> String
rows.intent: Fold registry policy fail-closed: disallowed level or over-max risk -> denied, else 'ok'.

rows.name: admitVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow admitVerdict(sigVerdict: String, lookupResult: String, policyResult: String) -> String
rows.intent: Compose the three registry gates: the first non-success verdict wins; all pass -> 'admitted'.

rows.name: secureMaxBodyBytes
rows.intent: The secure body-size ceiling in bytes; posture 'on' (#195) tightens 256 KB to 64 KB.

rows.name: secureMaxConcurrent
rows.intent: The secure max-concurrent ceiling; posture 'on' tightens 10 to 5.

rows.name: isBodySizeRelaxation
rows.signature: pure flow isBodySizeRelaxation(userMaxBytes: Int, postureOn: Bool) -> Bool
rows.intent: True iff a route widens the body-size ceiling above the secure default (a recorded relaxation).

rows.name: isFieldPolicyRelaxation
rows.intent: True iff a body field-policy is anything but the secure 'deny' default.

rows.name: isAuthRelaxation
rows.intent: True iff a route sets auth mode 'public', relaxing the required-auth default.

rows.name: idempotentByDefault
rows.intent: True iff the HTTP method mutates state, so idempotency is on by default.

rows.name: isIdempotencyRelaxation
rows.signature: pure flow isIdempotencyRelaxation(method: String, enabled: Bool) -> Bool
rows.intent: True iff a mutating-method route disables idempotency (a recorded relaxation).

rows.name: admitSecrets
rows.signature: pure flow admitSecrets(providerPresent: Bool, required: Array<SecretPresence>) -> String
rows.intent: Fail-closed secret admit: 'admit' iff the provider is present AND every required secret is present; else 'secret_unavailable'.

rows.name: quorumVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow quorumVerdict(distinctApprovals: Int, m: Int, malformed: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: M-of-N distinct-signer K3 fold: malformed -> INDETERMINATE (0); >= M approvals -> ALLOW (1); else DENY (-1).

rows.name: leaseVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow leaseVerdict(wellFormed: Bool, nowFinite: Bool, now: Int, notAfter: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: TTL lease K3 fold: malformed / non-finite clock -> INDETERMINATE (0); now < notAfter -> ALLOW (1); expired -> DENY (-1).

rows.name: bridgeAdmissionVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow bridgeAdmissionVerdict(shapeOk: Bool, hashPinned: Bool, signedOk: Bool, certifiedOk: Bool, notRevoked: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Fail-closed bridge admission: deny unless manifest shape, hash pin, signature, certified profile, and revocation all pass (RD-0364 IV5).

rows.name: attestedTierVerdict
rows.intent: Local-attested tier: a matching pinned weights hash earns attestation (+1); a mismatch is a model swap and is rejected (RD-0364 1).

rows.name: identityClassVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow identityClassVerdict(localAttested: Bool, weightsHashMatch: Bool, providerAsserted: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Honest model-identity tier: local-attested with a matching weights hash is attested (+1); cloud provider-asserted is INDETERMINATE (0); a hash mismatch or unattested bridge is rejected (RD-0364 1).

rows.name: costCapVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow costCapVerdict(withinCalls: Bool, withinTokens: Bool, withinSpend: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Cost-cap gate: deny (halt) when any of the per-flow maxCalls/maxTokens/maxSpend caps is exceeded (RD-0364 4).

rows.name: egressVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow egressVerdict(isCloud: Bool, hostAllowed: Bool, inputRedacted: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Cloud egress gate: a cloud inference call is denied unless the provider host is allowlisted and inputs passed the redaction boundary; local calls have no egress (RD-0364 3).

rows.name: outputTrustTrit
rows.intent: Output taint: inference output is UNKNOWN (0) until discharged by a declared verifier flow; only then may it be trusted (+1) (RD-0364 2, RD-0337 trit).

rows.name: inferenceCallVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow inferenceCallVerdict(bridgeAdmitted: Bool, identityClass: Int, requireCertified: Bool, costOk: Bool, egressOk: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Deny-by-default per-call inference admission: ALLOW only if the bridge is admitted, the identity class is acceptable (certified profile requires local-attested), cost caps hold, and cloud egress is clean (RD-0364).

rows.name: classicalVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow classicalVerdict(edPresent: Bool, edValid: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Classical half: deny unless the Ed25519 signature is present and verifies.

rows.name: pqDowngradeVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow pqDowngradeVerdict(requireHybrid: Bool, mlKeyPresent: Bool, mlSigPresent: Bool, mlValid: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: No-PQ-downgrade: if hybrid is required, deny unless the ML-DSA-65 key + signature are present and verify; classical-only is refused (CRYPTO-002).

rows.name: certifiedVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow certifiedVerdict(requireCertified: Bool, mlSigPresent: Bool, mlValid: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Certified profile: deny a certified-profile attestation unless its ML-DSA-65 signature is present and verifies.

rows.name: pqAdmissionVerdict
rows.signature: pure flow pqAdmissionVerdict(edPresent: Bool, edValid: Bool, requireHybrid: Bool, mlKeyPresent: Bool, mlSigPresent: Bool, mlValid: Bool, requireCertified: Bool) -> Int
rows.intent: Deny-by-default PQ admission: allow only if the classical signature verifies, the no-PQ-downgrade rule holds, and the certified profile (if required) has a verified ML-DSA-65 half (CRYPTO-002).

rows.name: s4NextState
rows.signature: pure flow s4NextState(state: Int, hasKeys: Bool, enteredAt: Int, kind: Int, g: Int, nowMs: Int, timeoutMs: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: S4 delta projection: next TransportState (0 Established / 1 Recovering / 2 Closed), fail-closed — a 0 verdict holds Recovering, never resumes.

rows.name: s4Erased
rows.signature: pure flow s4Erased(state: Int, hasKeys: Bool, enteredAt: Int, kind: Int, g: Int, nowMs: Int, timeoutMs: Int) -> Bool
rows.intent: S4 erase projection: an edge into Closed erases held keys; Closed-stay and non-closing edges erase nothing.

rows.name: s4NextHasKeys
rows.signature: pure flow s4NextHasKeys(state: Int, hasKeys: Bool, enteredAt: Int, kind: Int, g: Int, nowMs: Int, timeoutMs: Int) -> Bool
rows.intent: S4 key projection: keys survive every edge except an edge into Closed (erase-on-close); resume holds keys.

rows.name: s4NextEnteredAt
rows.signature: pure flow s4NextEnteredAt(state: Int, hasKeys: Bool, enteredAt: Int, kind: Int, g: Int, nowMs: Int, timeoutMs: Int) -> Int
rows.intent: S4 clock projection: -1 outside Recovering; entering Recovering stamps nowMs; staying keeps the original entry (cumulative timeout).
